title: Lu Song
content:
Third fighter from 
Heng Yue Sect
 vs 
Xu Mu

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book One

2.2

Book Two

Background
[
]

He lost to the 
Xuan Dao Sect
 during one of their previous exchanges with 
Heng Yue Sect
 20 years ago, but managed to impress them.

He and 
Brother Zhang
 were rivals for the seat of Core Disciple ten years ago, however, he ambushed and injured Zhang Dekun at some point before a match with one of his relatives, causing Zhang Dekun to lose and Lu Song to win the competition. Lu Song told Zhang Dekun that if he wasn't satisfied by this result, he could challenge him in ten years.

History
[
]

Book One
[
]

He represents Heng You Sect as their 3rd fighter against Xuan Dao Sect's Xu Mu. He is superior, but is ultimately victor by foul when he is ambushed by 
Zhou Peng
.

Book Two
[
]

He is among the few disciples who remains loyal and leaves with the Ancestors when the Heng You Sect is taken over by the Xuan Dao Sect.
He is happy when Wang Kin turns Renegade, as that means he is now the Head Disciple again.
